title: HF Hub auth token + sharded download
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

ferrotorch-hub/src/download.rs supports public downloads but lacks:

1. Authorization: Bearer $HF_TOKEN header injection (needed for gated repos like meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B).
2. Discovery and download of all shards referenced in model.safetensors.index.json.
3. Resume support for interrupted downloads (current impl reads whole file into memory via Vec::new()).

Work:
- Read HF_TOKEN env var or $HOME/.cache/huggingface/token. Send as Bearer header when present.
- Add hf_download_model(repo: &str, revision: &str, cache: &HubCache) -> PathBuf that:
  - Fetches config.json + model.safetensors.index.json
  - Parses index.json to collect shard filenames
  - Downloads each shard into cache with SHA verification where available (HF publishes sha256 in X-Linked-Etag header for LFS files)
  - Streams to disk with a partial file + rename-on-complete pattern so a killed process can resume
- Integrate with load_safetensors_sharded.

Acceptance:
- hf_download_model('meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3-8B', 'main', cache) pulls all 4 shards + config.json + tokenizer.json to cache dir and returns the dir.
- Retried after Ctrl-C resumes from partial files.
- Private/unauth'd call to a gated repo returns a clear 401 error, not a cryptic parse failure.
